# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for cross-account CI/CD access with secure trust policy

Parameters:
  TrustedAccountId1:
    Type: String
    Description: First trusted AWS account ID
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid 12-digit AWS account ID

  TrustedAccountId2:
    Type: String
    Description: Second trusted AWS account ID
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid 12-digit AWS account ID

  TrustedAccountId3:
    Type: String
    Description: Third trusted AWS account ID
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid 12-digit AWS account ID

  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID for additional constraint
    AllowedPattern: '^o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-abc1234567)

  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Description: External ID for cross-account role assumption (shared secret)
    MinLength: 10
    MaxLength: 256
    NoEcho: true

Resources:
  CICDCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: CICDCrossAccountRole
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedAccountId1}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedAccountId2}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedAccountId3}:root'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
              StringLike:
                aws:PrincipalArn:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedAccountId1}:role/CICDPipelineRole'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedAccountId2}:role/CICDPipelineRole'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedAccountId3}:role/CICDPipelineRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CICDDeploymentPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-cicd-artifacts'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-cicd-artifacts/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeChangeSet'
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateChangeSet'
                  - 'cloudformation:ExecuteChangeSet'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/cicd-*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer'
                  - 'ecr:BatchGetImage'
                  - 'ecr:PutImage'
                  - 'ecr:InitiateLayerUpload'
                  - 'ecr:UploadLayerPart'
                  - 'ecr:CompleteLayerUpload'
                  - 'ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecr:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/cicd-*'
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'iam:CreateUser'
                  - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
                  - 'iam:AttachUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:AttachGroupPolicy'
                  - 'iam:PutUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:CreateLoginProfile'
                  - 'organizations:*'
                  - 'account:*'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: CICD
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CrossAccountCICDAccess

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the cross-account CI/CD role
    Value: !GetAtt CICDCrossAccountRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: CICDCrossAccountRoleArn

  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the cross-account CI/CD role
    Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
